SuperMovie Plugin の roku/phase3j-timeline branch 最新 commit (66e2aeb) を厳しめに review + Phase 3-K 推奨 consultation。

## Part A: Phase 3-J review

実装範囲: template/scripts/timeline.py 新規 (4 helper + 2 validation)、
3 script (voicevox_narration / build_slide_data / build_telop_data) で
重複していた FPS/cut helper を timeline.py へ移動。Codex Phase 3-I review
6 件指摘 (P1×2 + P2×2 + P3×2) を全 fix。

照合: `git show 66e2aeb --stat` / `git diff roku/phase3i-transcript-alignment..HEAD`

verify checklist:
- timeline.read_video_config_fps が 3 script で同一 FPS を返すか (videoConfig.ts FPS=30)
- timeline.validate_vad_schema がカバーする破損パターン (segment 内型欠落 / start>end / 配列要素非 dict)
- timeline.validate_transcript_segment が start/end optional かつ両方ある時のみ start<=end check
- voicevox_narration.project_load_cut_segments(fail_fast=True) で vad 破損時に exit 8 になる経路
- collect_chunks の TranscriptSegmentError catch が --script / --script-json / transcript 全 path で動くか
- build_slide_data の build_cut_segments_from_vad wrapper が validate_vad_schema を経由するか
- build_telop_data は cut helper 固有のため未統合 — 一貫性として OK か (今後 Phase 3-K で統合可)
- chunk_paths / chunk_meta length assert が write_narration_data 直前で正しく発火するか
- overlap WARN 文言が「transcript bug ではない」と明確に伝わるか

新規 regression / 罠:
- timeline.py の sys.path.insert 混入で他 script の import 順序が乱れる可能性
- timeline.build_cut_segments_from_vad は validated dict 前提だが、build_slide_data wrapper では validate_vad_schema 経由で OK、voicevox の load_cut_segments(fail_fast=True) でも OK か
- json.JSONDecodeError は load_cut_segments 内 catch (fail_fast=True で raise)、main() 側で json.JSONDecodeError catch 漏れていないか
- exit 8 の意味付けが SKILL.md に未記載 (誤理解で stale narration を残す operation してしまう恐れ)
- voicevox_narration.project_load_cut_segments の仕方が main() 内で呼ばれる順序が cleanup_stale_all 後 / synthesis 後で適切か

## Part B: Phase 3-K 推奨 consultation

Phase 3-A〜3-J 完了。timeline.py の存在を踏まえた次候補:

i. **build_telop_data.py の cut helper も timeline に完全統合** (Phase 3-J 残置)
   - find_cut_segment_for_ms helper だけ build_telop 独自、timeline に集約検討
   - 機械的、自走可、5-10 line diff

ii. **Studio hot-reload 自動化** (Codex 過去 review でずっと残置)
   - watchStaticFile / Cmd+R 不要にする Remotion 公式 API 利用
   - mode.ts / NarrationAudio.tsx の参照刷新

iii. **any 警告ゼロ化** (Phase 3-E 残置)
   - eslint no-explicit-any error 化、telop-templates-30 由来の any 実型化

iv. **narration crossfade / silence handling**
   - chunk 間 short silence (人間らしさ) + overlap 時 crossfade
   - audio engineering 領域、scope 大

v. **slide_plan.v2 + scene_plan 統合** (Roku ビジョン土台)
   - LLM が transcript からスライド + b-roll 一気プラン
   - Anthropic API 課金、Roku 判断

vi. **transcript validation を build_slide_data でも導入** (Phase 3-J で voicevox のみ)
   - build_slide_data.py / build_telop_data.py も validate_transcript_segment
     で壊れた transcript 早期検出

vii. **integration smoke test** (timeline.py 経由で end-to-end 連鎖)
   - 仮想 transcript / vad → timeline → 3 script → narrationData/slideData/telopData
     の連鎖が崩れないかの単体テスト
   - Phase 3-G visual_smoke の上位で pure python テスト

聞きたいこと:
- どれを Phase 3-K に着手すべきか (推奨 1 + 次点 1 + 理由)
- 推奨 phase の設計概要
- 危険ポイント top3
- Codex review 重点項目

---
name: verification-gate
description: 事実主張を含む応答を組み立てる前に必ず起動する Citation 強制 skill。Anthropic 公式 reduce hallucinations docs の「主張 → 引用検索 → 引用なし主張削除 + [] マーカー」フォーマットに従う。「分析して」「教えて」「まとめて」「報告して」「結論は」「現状は」「データは」「件数は」「いつ」「誰が」「どこで」「いくら」等の事実主張要求が来た時に即起動。Roku の「虚偽多すぎる」指摘 (2026-04-29) を起点とする構造的予防策の Layer 4。一次防衛は CLAUDE.md HARD RULE + UserPromptSubmit hook、本 skill は補強層
---

# Verification Gate

このskillはAnthropic公式 reduce hallucinations docs の「Citations フォーマット強制」パターンを skill 化したもの。

## 発動タイミング

ユーザーが事実主張・分析・報告・推論を求めた時:

- 「分析して」「教えて」「まとめて」「報告して」「調べて」
- 「結論は」「現状は」「データは」「状況は」
- 「件数は」「いつ」「誰が」「どこで」「いくら」「どのくらい」
- 「効果は」「結果は」「影響は」
- 過去状態・他者行動結果・外部システム状態への言及を含む応答

## Phase 1: 主張のリストアップ (内部処理)

ドラフト応答を組み立てる前に、含まれる主張を箇条書きで内部抽出する。

事実主張の定義:
- 数値 (件数・金額・%・時間・人数 等)
- 人物名・案件名・固有名詞
- 日時・予定・期日
- 他者の行動結果 (送信した・反映した・実行した 等)
- 外部システムの状態 (DB に N 件・ファイルに〜と書いてある 等)
- 状態評価 (動いている・壊れている・効果あった 等)

## Phase 2: 各主張に対する根拠取得

各主張について、必ず以下のいずれかで根拠を取得する:

| 主張のタイプ | 取得手段 | 引用フォーマット |
|---|---|---|
| ファイルの記述 | Read | `(file_path:line_number)` |
| Chatwork メッセージ | `mcp__chatwork__get_message_detail` | `(get_message_detail で取得, msg_id=...)` |
| Gmail スレッド | `mcp__claude_ai_Gmail__get_thread` | `(get_thread で取得, thread_id=...)` |
| Notion ページ | `mcp__hugruma-notion__API-retrieve-a-page` 等 | `(retrieve-a-page で取得)` |
| カレンダー予定 | `mcp__claude_ai_Google_Calendar__list_events` | `(list_events で取得)` |
| Web 公式ドキュメント | WebFetch | `(出典 URL)` |
| Git 状態 | Bash で `git log` `git show` `git diff` | `(Bash 実測)` |
| 過去のユーザー発言 | 会話履歴の原文引用 | `(Roku 発言: "原文")` |
| 上記いずれも不可 | 主張を削除 | `[未検証]` または `[不明]` マーカー |

## Phase 3: 引用なし主張の削除

根拠取得に失敗した主張は応答から削除し、削除位置に `[未検証]` または `[不明]` を残す。

例:
- Before: `この機能は3日で実装できます。`
- After: `この機能の実装期間は [未検証] です。`

## Phase 4: 残った主張のみで応答を再構成

引用付き主張のみで応答を組み立てる。引用がない主張は構造的に書けない。

## 限界

skill 自動起動忘れの可能性あり。

- 一次防衛 (確実): CLAUDE.md HARD RULE (Layer 1) + UserPromptSubmit hook 全ターン無条件注入 (Layer 2)
- 本 skill は補強層 (Layer 4)
- skill が起動しなくても Layer 1+2 が常時作動する設計

## 出典・関連

- Anthropic 公式 reduce hallucinations: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/test-and-evaluate/strengthen-guardrails/reduce-hallucinations
- 設計プラン: `~/.claude/plans/hallucination-prevention-overhaul.md` Layer 4
- 関連 feedback: `feedback_citation_enforcement.md` `feedback_structural_deception.md` `feedback_no_fake_knowledge_reference.md`

    feat(timeline): timeline.py 共通化 + Phase 3-I review 6 件 fix (Phase 3-J)
    
    Codex Phase 3-I review (CODEX_REVIEW_PHASE3I_AND_NEXT_20260504T215824) verdict:
    P0 なし、P1×2 + P2×2 + P3×2、全自走可。Part B 推奨 v (FPS 統一) +
    timeline.py 共通化を採用。
    
    新規:
    - template/scripts/timeline.py: 4 helper を集約
      - read_video_config_fps(proj, default): src/videoConfig.ts の FPS 一次 source
      - build_cut_segments_from_vad(vad, fps): cut timeline 構築 (validate 後)
      - ms_to_playback_frame(ms, fps, cut_segments): cut-aware ms→frame
      - load_cut_segments(proj, fps, fail_fast): vad_result.json 読込
      - VadSchemaError + validate_vad_schema: vad 部分破損を fail-fast 検出 (P1 #2)
      - TranscriptSegmentError + validate_transcript_segment: transcript の
        start > end / 型不正を fail-fast 検出 (P2 #3)
    
    修正:
    - build_slide_data.py: FPS=60 hardcode → timeline.read_video_config_fps(PROJ)、
      build_cut_segments_from_vad / ms_to_playback_frame は timeline 委譲 wrapper
      に置換 (validate_vad_schema 経由で fail-fast に強化)
    - build_telop_data.py: FPS=60 hardcode → timeline.read_video_config_fps(PROJ)
      (cut helpers は build_telop 固有なので未統合)
    - voicevox_narration.py:
      - timeline 全 helper を import、ローカル重複定義を削除
      - project_load_cut_segments(): voicevox 専用 wrapper (fail_fast=True 固定)
      - main() 内 vad 読込で VadSchemaError catch → exit 8 で全 rollback
        (chunks + narration.wav 削除、stale legacy 経路を防ぐ、P1 #2)
      - main() 内 collect_chunks の TranscriptSegmentError catch → exit 3 (P2 #3)
      - chunk_paths と chunk_meta の長さ assert 追加 (P3 #6)
      - overlap WARN 文言を「transcript bug ではなく TTS 出力長 / 隣接 chunk
        timing が原因、対処は transcript 再分割 / chunk 短縮 / 早話速度 /
        sourceStartMs 後送り」に書き換え (P2 #4)
    
    Codex Part A 指摘 6 件:
    - P1 #1 FPS 不統一 → timeline.read_video_config_fps で 3 script 統一 ✅
    - P1 #2 vad 部分破損 catch なし → validate_vad_schema + fail_fast=True ✅
    - P2 #3 transcript validation → validate_transcript_segment in collect_chunks ✅
    - P2 #4 overlap WARN noise → 文言で TTS 由来明示 ✅
    - P3 #5 collect_chunks return type 影響 → 元から呼び出し main() のみ、不要
    - P3 #6 zip length assert → 追加 ✅
    
    検証 (Bash 実測 / python3 unit test):
    - timeline.read_video_config_fps(PROJ) → 30 (template の videoConfig.ts FPS=30)
    - timeline.validate_vad_schema(壊れた dict / list / start>end) → VadSchemaError
    - timeline.validate_transcript_segment(start>end) → TranscriptSegmentError
    - timeline.load_cut_segments(壊れ json, fail_fast=True) → raise
    - build_slide_data.build_cut_segments_from_vad → timeline 委譲、
      start>end VAD で VadSchemaError raise OK
    - voicevox_narration.collect_chunks(start>end transcript) →
      TranscriptSegmentError raise OK
    - 3 script syntax OK / --help OK
    
    未検証:
    - 実 VOICEVOX engine + 実 transcript_fixed.json + 実 vad_result.json 連携
    - TypeScript tsc / eslint (npm install permission issue)

     1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	"""SuperMovie Phase 3-J: timeline 共通 utility.
     3	
     4	Codex Phase 3-I review (CODEX_REVIEW_PHASE3I_AND_NEXT_20260504T215824) Part B
     5	推奨に従い、複数 script (voicevox_narration.py / build_slide_data.py /
     6	build_telop_data.py) で重複していた以下を 1 module に集約:
     7	
     8	- read_video_config_fps(): src/videoConfig.ts の FPS = N を一次 source 化
     9	- build_cut_segments_from_vad(): vad_result.json から cut timeline 構築
    10	- ms_to_playback_frame(): cut-aware ms → playback frame 変換
    11	- validate_vad_schema(): vad_result.json の部分破損 (KeyError / TypeError) を
    12	  早期 fail-fast で検出 (Codex Phase 3-I review P1 #2 反映)
    13	- validate_transcript_segment(): transcript_fixed.json segments[].start/end
    14	  の型 / 順序 validation (Codex Phase 3-I review P2 #3 反映)
    15	
    16	これにより slide / telop / narration が全て同一 ms→frame mapping を共有し、
    17	videoConfig.FPS を一次 source として Remotion render と同期する
    18	(出典: https://www.remotion.dev/docs/composition)。
    19	"""
    20	from __future__ import annotations
    21	
    22	import json
    23	import re
    24	from pathlib import Path
    25	
    26	DEFAULT_FPS = 30
    27	FPS_LINE_RE = re.compile(r"^export const FPS\s*=\s*(\d+)\s*;", re.MULTILINE)
    28	
    29	
    30	def read_video_config_fps(proj: Path, default: int = DEFAULT_FPS) -> int:
    31	    """`<proj>/src/videoConfig.ts` の `export const FPS = N;` を読む.
    32	
    33	    読めなければ default。`FPS <= 0` も default に倒す (P2 #4 反映)。
    34	    """
    35	    video_config = proj / "src" / "videoConfig.ts"
    36	    if not video_config.exists():
    37	        return default
    38	    try:
    39	        text = video_config.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    40	    except OSError:
    41	        return default
    42	    m = FPS_LINE_RE.search(text)
    43	    if not m:
    44	        return default
    45	    try:
    46	        fps = int(m.group(1))
    47	    except ValueError:
    48	        return default
    49	    return fps if fps > 0 else default
    50	
    51	
    52	class VadSchemaError(ValueError):
    53	    """vad_result.json schema 不整合 (Codex P1 #2 反映、fail-fast 用)."""
    54	
    55	
    56	def validate_vad_schema(vad: object) -> dict:
    57	    """vad_result.json の最低限 schema を検査して dict を返す.
    58	
    59	    必須: dict に `speech_segments` key があり、list、各要素 dict で
    60	    `start` / `end` が int か float、start <= end。
    61	    破損は VadSchemaError。
    62	    """
    63	    if not isinstance(vad, dict):
    64	        raise VadSchemaError(f"vad must be dict, got {type(vad).__name__}")
    65	    segments = vad.get("speech_segments")
    66	    if not isinstance(segments, list):
    67	        raise VadSchemaError(
    68	            f"vad['speech_segments'] must be list, got {type(segments).__name__}"
    69	        )
    70	    for i, seg in enumerate(segments):
    71	        if not isinstance(seg, dict):
    72	            raise VadSchemaError(f"segment[{i}] must be dict, got {type(seg).__name__}")
    73	        for key in ("start", "end"):
    74	            v = seg.get(key)
    75	            if not isinstance(v, (int, float)):
    76	                raise VadSchemaError(
    77	                    f"segment[{i}].{key} must be int|float, got {type(v).__name__}"
    78	                )
    79	        if seg["start"] > seg["end"]:
    80	            raise VadSchemaError(
    81	                f"segment[{i}] start={seg['start']} > end={seg['end']}"
    82	            )
    83	    return vad
    84	
    85	
    86	def build_cut_segments_from_vad(vad: dict, fps: int) -> list[dict]:
    87	    """vad の speech_segments から cut 後 timeline mapping を構築.
    88	
    89	    呼び出し前に validate_vad_schema() で検査済みであることを前提とする。
    90	    fps は呼び出し側の videoConfig.FPS を渡す (Phase 3-J: hardcode 撤廃)。
    91	    """
    92	    out: list[dict] = []
    93	    cursor_ms = 0
    94	    for i, seg in enumerate(vad["speech_segments"]):
    95	        s_ms = seg["start"]
    96	        e_ms = seg["end"]
    97	        dur_ms = e_ms - s_ms
    98	        out.append(
    99	            {
   100	                "id": i + 1,
   101	                "originalStartMs": s_ms,
   102	                "originalEndMs": e_ms,
   103	                "playbackStart": round(cursor_ms / 1000 * fps),
   104	                "playbackEnd": round((cursor_ms + dur_ms) / 1000 * fps),
   105	            }
   106	        )
   107	        cursor_ms += dur_ms
   108	    return out
   109	
   110	
   111	def load_cut_segments(proj: Path, fps: int, fail_fast: bool = False) -> list[dict]:
   112	    """`<proj>/vad_result.json` から cut_segments を構築.
   113	
   114	    fail_fast=False (default): 不在 / I/O / schema エラーは [] にして黙過。
   115	    fail_fast=True: 部分破損も VadSchemaError / OSError で raise。
   116	
   117	    Codex Phase 3-I review P1 #2 反映: 黙過は legacy 経路へ流れて stale
   118	    narration を出す危険があるので、narration script では fail_fast=True 推奨。
   119	    """
   120	    vad_path = proj / "vad_result.json"
   121	    if not vad_path.exists():
   122	        return []
   123	    try:
   124	        with vad_path.open("r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
   125	            data = json.load(f)
   126	    except (OSError, json.JSONDecodeError) as e:
   127	        if fail_fast:
   128	            raise
   129	        return []
   130	    try:
   131	        validated = validate_vad_schema(data)
   132	    except VadSchemaError:
   133	        if fail_fast:
   134	            raise
   135	        return []
   136	    return build_cut_segments_from_vad(validated, fps)
   137	
   138	
   139	def ms_to_playback_frame(ms: int, fps: int, cut_segments: list[dict]) -> int | None:
   140	    """元動画の ms を playback frame に変換 (cut-aware).
   141	
   142	    cut_segments が空なら直接変換。ms が cut 範囲外 (cut で除外された箇所) は
   143	    None を返す (呼出側が累積 fallback or skip 判断)。
   144	    """
   145	    if not cut_segments:
   146	        return round(ms / 1000 * fps)
   147	    for cs in cut_segments:
   148	        if cs["originalStartMs"] <= ms <= cs["originalEndMs"]:
   149	            offset_ms = ms - cs["originalStartMs"]
   150	            return cs["playbackStart"] + round(offset_ms / 1000 * fps)
   151	    return None
   152	
   153	
   154	class TranscriptSegmentError(ValueError):
   155	    """transcript segment の型 / 順序 異常 (Codex P2 #3 反映)."""
   156	
   157	
   158	def validate_transcript_segment(seg: object, idx: int = -1) -> dict:
   159	    """transcript_fixed.json の 1 segment の最低限検査.
   160	
   161	    必須: dict に `text` (str)、`start` / `end` が int|float|None。start/end
   162	    両方 numeric なら start <= end。違反は TranscriptSegmentError。
   163	    """
   164	    label = f"segment[{idx}]" if idx >= 0 else "segment"
   165	    if not isinstance(seg, dict):
   166	        raise TranscriptSegmentError(f"{label} must be dict, got {type(seg).__name__}")
   167	    text = seg.get("text")
   168	    if text is not None and not isinstance(text, str):
   169	        raise TranscriptSegmentError(
   170	            f"{label}.text must be str|None, got {type(text).__name__}"
   171	        )
   172	    s = seg.get("start")
   173	    e = seg.get("end")
   174	    for k, v in (("start", s), ("end", e)):
   175	        if v is not None and not isinstance(v, (int, float)):
   176	            raise TranscriptSegmentError(
   177	                f"{label}.{k} must be int|float|None, got {type(v).__name__}"
   178	            )
   179	    if isinstance(s, (int, float)) and isinstance(e, (int, float)) and s > e:
   180	        raise TranscriptSegmentError(f"{label} start={s} > end={e}")
   181	    return seg

     1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	"""SuperMovie Phase 3-D/H: VOICEVOX で transcript_fixed.json から narration を生成.
     3	
     4	Phase 3-D 設計起点 (Codex CODEX_PHASE3D_VOICEVOX, 2026-05-04):
     5	- engine 不在で skip (--require-engine 指定時のみ exit non-zero)
     6	- 入力: transcript_fixed.json の segments[] / project-config.json の tone
     7	- 入力 override: --script narration_script.txt / --script-json narration_script.json
     8	- 出力: public/narration.wav (segments 個別 wav を結合、legacy fallback)
     9	- API: POST /audio_query → POST /synthesis (公式 https://github.com/VOICEVOX/voicevox_engine)
    10	
    11	Phase 3-H 拡張 (Codex CODEX_PHASE3H_NEXT, 2026-05-04):
    12	- chunk_NNN.wav を public/narration/ に保持 (削除しない、render 時に必要)
    13	- 各 chunk の wave header から実 duration を測定
    14	- src/Narration/narrationData.ts を all-or-nothing で生成
    15	  (NarrationSegment[] = [{id, startFrame, durationInFrames, file, text}])
    16	- public/narration/chunk_meta.json も debug 用に出力
    17	- stale chunk + 旧 narration.wav (前回実行の遺物) を synthesis 前に必ず cleanup
    18	- partial failure 時は narrationData.ts を空に reset + 部分 chunk 削除、二重音声防止
    19	
    20	Phase 3-H review fix (Codex CODEX_REVIEW_PHASE3H_20260504T213301, P1×2 + P2×4):
    21	- 全 narration 出力 (narration.wav / narrationData.ts / chunk_meta.json) を
    22	  tempfile + os.replace で atomic 書き換え (SIGINT/disk full 安全、P2 #3)
    23	- FPS は src/videoConfig.ts の `export const FPS = N;` を一次 source に
    24	  (P2 #4 + P2 #5、project-config.json の malformed AttributeError と Remotion 実値ズレを解消)
    25	- wave.Error / EOFError を catch して exit 6 で all-or-nothing rollback (P2 #6)
    26	- partial failure 時に旧 narration.wav も削除 (P1 #2、stale legacy 再生事故防止)
    27	
    28	Usage:
    29	    python3 scripts/voicevox_narration.py
    30	    python3 scripts/voicevox_narration.py --speaker 3
    31	    python3 scripts/voicevox_narration.py --script narration.txt
    32	    python3 scripts/voicevox_narration.py --list-speakers
    33	    python3 scripts/voicevox_narration.py --require-engine
    34	    python3 scripts/voicevox_narration.py --fps 60      # FPS 明示 (default は src/videoConfig.ts FPS)
    35	
    36	Engine 起動 (Roku ローカル):
    37	    https://voicevox.hiroshiba.jp/ から VOICEVOX をインストール、起動すると
    38	    127.0.0.1:50021 で REST API が立つ。Docker 版もあり (公式 README 参照)。
    39	"""
    40	from __future__ import annotations
    41	
    42	import argparse
    43	import json
    44	import os
    45	import sys
    46	import urllib.error
    47	import urllib.parse
    48	import urllib.request
    49	import wave
    50	from pathlib import Path
    51	
    52	PROJ = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent
    53	sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).resolve().parent))
    54	from timeline import (  # noqa: E402
    55	    DEFAULT_FPS,
    56	    TranscriptSegmentError,
    57	    VadSchemaError,
    58	    build_cut_segments_from_vad,
    59	    load_cut_segments,
    60	    ms_to_playback_frame,
    61	    read_video_config_fps,
    62	    validate_transcript_segment,
    63	)
    64	
    65	ENGINE_BASE = "http://127.0.0.1:50021"
    66	DEFAULT_SPEAKER = 3  # ずんだもん (ノーマル)、Roku が --speaker で上書き可
    67	TIMEOUT = 30
    68	
    69	NARRATION_DIR = PROJ / "public" / "narration"
    70	NARRATION_LEGACY_WAV = PROJ / "public" / "narration.wav"
    71	NARRATION_DATA_TS = PROJ / "src" / "Narration" / "narrationData.ts"
    72	CHUNK_META_JSON = NARRATION_DIR / "chunk_meta.json"
    73	EMPTY_NARRATION_DATA = (
    74	    "import type { NarrationSegment } from './types';\n"
    75	    "\n"
    76	    "export const narrationData: NarrationSegment[] = [];\n"
    77	)
    78	
    79	
    80	def _tmp_path(path: Path) -> Path:
    81	    """`.{name}.{pid}.tmp` 形式の temp path を返す.
    82	
    83	    PID 付与で同一 project の同時実行による tmp 衝突を回避
    84	    (Codex Phase 3-H fix re-review 新規 P2 反映)。
    85	    """
    86	    return path.with_name(f".{path.name}.{os.getpid()}.tmp")
    87	
    88	
    89	def atomic_write_bytes(path: Path, data: bytes) -> None:
    90	    """tempfile + os.replace で atomic 書換 (Codex Phase 3-H review P2 #3 反映).
    91	
    92	    write 中例外時は finally で tmp を unlink (Codex re-review 新規 P3 反映)。
    93	    """
    94	    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    95	    tmp = _tmp_path(path)
    96	    try:
    97	        tmp.write_bytes(data)
    98	        os.replace(tmp, path)
    99	    except Exception:
   100	        if tmp.exists():
   101	            try:
   102	                tmp.unlink()
   103	            except OSError:
   104	                pass
   105	        raise
   106	
   107	
   108	def atomic_write_text(path: Path, content: str) -> None:
   109	    """tempfile + os.replace で atomic 書換 (Codex Phase 3-H review P2 #3 反映).
   110	
   111	    write 中例外時は finally で tmp を unlink (Codex re-review 新規 P3 反映)。
   112	    """
   113	    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   114	    tmp = _tmp_path(path)
   115	    try:
   116	        tmp.write_text(content, encoding="utf-8")
   117	        os.replace(tmp, path)
   118	    except Exception:
   119	        if tmp.exists():
   120	            try:
   121	                tmp.unlink()
   122	            except OSError:
   123	                pass
   124	        raise
   125	
   126	
   127	def load_json(p: Path):
   128	    return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   129	
   130	
   131	def http_request(method: str, path: str, params: dict | None = None,
   132	                 body: dict | None = None) -> bytes:
   133	    url = ENGINE_BASE + path
   134	    if params:
   135	        url += "?" + urllib.parse.urlencode(params)
   136	    data = json.dumps(body).encode("utf-8") if body is not None else None
   137	    headers = {"Content-Type": "application/json"} if body is not None else {}
   138	    req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers=headers, method=method)
   139	    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=TIMEOUT) as resp:
   140	        return resp.read()
   141	
   142	
   143	def check_engine() -> tuple[bool, str | None]:
   144	    try:
   145	        body = http_request("GET", "/version")
   146	        return True, body.decode("utf-8").strip().strip('"')
   147	    except (urllib.error.URLError, OSError, urllib.error.HTTPError) as e:
   148	        return False, str(e)
   149	
   150	
   151	def list_speakers() -> list[dict]:
   152	    body = http_request("GET", "/speakers")
   153	    return json.loads(body.decode("utf-8"))
   154	
   155	
   156	def synthesize(text: str, speaker: int) -> bytes:
   157	    """audio_query → synthesis の二段階で WAV bytes を返す."""
   158	    aq_body = http_request("POST", "/audio_query", params={"text": text, "speaker": speaker}, body={})
   159	    aq = json.loads(aq_body.decode("utf-8"))
   160	    wav_bytes = http_request("POST", "/synthesis", params={"speaker": speaker}, body=aq)
   161	    return wav_bytes
   162	
   163	
   164	def concat_wavs_atomic(wavs: list[Path], out_path: Path) -> None:
   165	    """同一 sample rate / channel の wav 列を時系列で結合し atomic に書く.
   166	
   167	    wave.Error は呼び出し側で catch して all-or-nothing rollback する
   168	    (Codex Phase 3-H review P2 #6 反映). write 中例外時は finally で tmp を
   169	    unlink して残骸を残さない (Codex re-review 新規 P3 反映)。
   170	    """
   171	    if not wavs:
   172	        return
   173	    out_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   174	    tmp = _tmp_path(out_path)
   175	    try:
   176	        with wave.open(str(wavs[0]), "rb") as w0:
   177	            params = w0.getparams()
   178	            frames = [w0.readframes(w0.getnframes())]
   179	        for p in wavs[1:]:
   180	            with wave.open(str(p), "rb") as w:
   181	                if (w.getframerate(), w.getnchannels(), w.getsampwidth()) != (params.framerate, params.nchannels, params.sampwidth):
   182	                    print(f"WARN: {p.name} format mismatch、skip", file=sys.stderr)
   183	                    continue
   184	                frames.append(w.readframes(w.getnframes()))
   185	        with wave.open(str(tmp), "wb") as out:
   186	            out.setparams(params)
   187	            for f in frames:
   188	                out.writeframes(f)
   189	        os.replace(tmp, out_path)
   190	    except Exception:
   191	        if tmp.exists():
   192	            try:
   193	                tmp.unlink()
   194	            except OSError:
   195	                pass
   196	        raise
   197	
   198	
   199	def measure_duration_seconds(wav_path: Path) -> float:
   200	    """WAV header の (nframes / framerate) で正確な duration を返す.
   201	
   202	    wave.Error / EOFError は呼び出し側で catch (Codex P2 #6 反映)。
   203	    """
   204	    with wave.open(str(wav_path), "rb") as w:
   205	        return w.getnframes() / float(w.getframerate())
   206	
   207	
   208	class StaleCleanupError(RuntimeError):
   209	    """cleanup_stale_all() で legacy narration.wav の削除に失敗した時に raise."""
   210	
   211	
   212	def cleanup_stale_all() -> None:
   213	    """旧 chunk_*.wav / chunk_meta.json / narration.wav / narrationData.ts を全 reset.
   214	
   215	    Codex Phase 3-H review P1 #2 反映: 旧 narration.wav が残ると partial failure 後に
   216	    legacy mode で stale narration が再生される事故を起こすため、必ず全削除する。
   217	
   218	    Codex re-review P1 #2 partial 反映: legacy wav の削除失敗は WARN ではなく
   219	    StaleCleanupError raise (削除失敗を黙過すると残置 → mode helper が legacy
   220	    経路に入り、stale narration を再生してしまう)。chunks / chunk_meta は
   221	    どうせ atomic で上書きされるため WARN 継続で OK。
   222	    """
   223	    if NARRATION_DIR.exists():
   224	        for p in NARRATION_DIR.glob("chunk_*.wav"):
   225	            try:
   226	                p.unlink()
   227	            except OSError as e:
   228	                print(f"WARN: stale chunk {p.name} 削除失敗: {e}", file=sys.stderr)
   229	        if CHUNK_META_JSON.exists():
   230	            try:
   231	                CHUNK_META_JSON.unlink()
   232	            except OSError as e:
   233	                print(f"WARN: stale chunk_meta.json 削除失敗: {e}", file=sys.stderr)
   234	    if NARRATION_LEGACY_WAV.exists():
   235	        try:
   236	            NARRATION_LEGACY_WAV.unlink()
   237	        except OSError as e:
   238	            raise StaleCleanupError(
   239	                f"stale narration.wav 削除失敗、stale legacy 再生事故防止のため処理中断: {e}"
   240	            ) from e
   241	    reset_narration_data_ts()
   242	
   243	
   244	def reset_narration_data_ts() -> None:
   245	    """narrationData.ts を空 array に戻す (Phase 3-H all-or-nothing)、atomic 書換。"""
   246	    if NARRATION_DATA_TS.parent.exists():
   247	        atomic_write_text(NARRATION_DATA_TS, EMPTY_NARRATION_DATA)
   248	
   249	
   250	def project_load_cut_segments(fps: int) -> list[dict]:
   251	    """voicevox 側の load_cut_segments wrapper (PROJ + fail_fast 戦略を固定).
   252	
   253	    Codex Phase 3-I review P1 #2 反映: narration script では legacy 経路へ
   254	    流れて stale narration を出す危険があるので fail_fast=True (raise)。
   255	    呼び出し側で VadSchemaError / OSError / json.JSONDecodeError を catch する。
   256	    """
   257	    return load_cut_segments(PROJ, fps, fail_fast=True)
   258	
   259	
   260	def write_narration_data(
   261	    chunks: list[tuple[Path, str, int | None, int | None]],
   262	    fps: int,
   263	    cut_segments: list[dict],
   264	) -> tuple[list[dict], Path, Path]:
   265	    """各 chunk の duration を測って narrationData.ts と chunk_meta.json を書く.
   266	
   267	    両方とも atomic 書換 (Codex P2 #3 反映)。wave.Error は呼び出し側で catch。
   268	    Phase 3-I: chunks tuple は (path, text, sourceStartMs, sourceEndMs)。
   269	    sourceStartMs があれば transcript timing alignment、なければ累積 fallback。
   270	    cut_segments があれば cut-aware mapping、cut で除外された ms は累積 fallback。
   271	    """
   272	    segments: list[dict] = []
   273	    cumulative_frame = 0
   274	    overlap_warns: list[str] = []
   275	    for i, (path, text, source_start_ms, source_end_ms) in enumerate(chunks):
   276	        duration_sec = measure_duration_seconds(path)
   277	        duration_frames = max(1, round(duration_sec * fps))
   278	        rel = path.relative_to(PROJ / "public").as_posix()
   279	
   280	        # startFrame: transcript timing > 累積 fallback
   281	        start_frame = cumulative_frame
   282	        timing_source = "cumulative"
   283	        if source_start_ms is not None:
   284	            mapped = ms_to_playback_frame(source_start_ms, fps, cut_segments)
   285	            if mapped is None:
   286	                print(
   287	                    f"WARN: chunk {i} sourceStartMs={source_start_ms}ms は cut 範囲外、"
   288	                    f"累積 frame={cumulative_frame} で fallback",
   289	                    file=sys.stderr,
   290	                )
   291	            else:
   292	                start_frame = mapped
   293	                timing_source = "transcript_aligned"
   294	
   295	        # overlap 検出 (前 chunk の終端 > 現 startFrame)
   296	        if segments:
   297	            prev = segments[-1]
   298	            prev_end = prev["startFrame"] + prev["durationInFrames"]
   299	            if prev_end > start_frame:
   300	                overlap_warns.append(
   301	                    f"chunk {i - 1}->{i}: prev end frame={prev_end} > start={start_frame} "
   302	                    f"({prev_end - start_frame} frames overlap)"
   303	                )
   304	
   305	        seg_dict: dict = {
   306	            "id": i,
   307	            "startFrame": start_frame,
   308	            "durationInFrames": duration_frames,
   309	            "file": rel,
   310	            "text": text[:100],  # debug 用、長文は切り詰め
   311	            "duration_sec": round(duration_sec, 3),
   312	            "timing_source": timing_source,
   313	        }
   314	        if source_start_ms is not None:
   315	            seg_dict["sourceStartMs"] = source_start_ms
   316	        if source_end_ms is not None:
   317	            seg_dict["sourceEndMs"] = source_end_ms
   318	        segments.append(seg_dict)
   319	        cumulative_frame = start_frame + duration_frames
   320	
   321	    if overlap_warns:
   322	        # Codex Phase 3-I review P2 #4 反映: 文言を「transcript bug ではなく
   323	        # TTS が transcript より長い signal」として明確化、対処は transcript
   324	        # 再分割 / chunk text 短縮 / TTS 早話速度 / 隣接 chunk の sourceStart 後ろ送り。
   325	        print(
   326	            f"WARN: {len(overlap_warns)} narration <Sequence> overlap(s) detected. "
   327	            f"これは transcript の bug ではなく、TTS 出力 wav が元 transcript の "
   328	            f"interval より長いか、隣接 chunk が transcript timing 上で接近しすぎ。"
   329	            f"render では二重再生になるので、対処: "
   330	            f"(1) transcript 再分割、(2) chunk text 短縮、(3) speaker 早話速度、"
   331	            f"(4) sourceStartMs を後ろ送り。",
   332	            file=sys.stderr,
   333	        )
   334	        for w in overlap_warns:
   335	            print(f"  - {w}", file=sys.stderr)
   336	
   337	    total_frames = max((s["startFrame"] + s["durationInFrames"] for s in segments), default=0)
   338	    atomic_write_text(
   339	        CHUNK_META_JSON,
   340	        json.dumps(
   341	            {
   342	                "fps": fps,
   343	                "total_frames": total_frames,
   344	                "cut_aware": bool(cut_segments),
   345	                "overlaps": overlap_warns,
   346	                "segments": segments,
   347	            },
   348	            ensure_ascii=False,
   349	            indent=2,
   350	        ),
   351	    )
   352	
   353	    ts_lines = [
   354	        "/**",
   355	        " * Phase 3-H: voicevox_narration.py が all-or-nothing + atomic で書換える narration timeline。",
   356	        " * NarrationAudio.tsx が <Sequence from={startFrame} durationInFrames={...}> でループ再生する。",
   357	        " * 手動編集禁止 (script 再実行で上書きされる)。",
   358	        " */",
   359	        "import type { NarrationSegment } from './types';",
   360	        "",
   361	        "export const narrationData: NarrationSegment[] = [",
   362	    ]
   363	    for s in segments:
   364	        parts = [
   365	            f"id: {s['id']}",
   366	            f"startFrame: {s['startFrame']}",
   367	            f"durationInFrames: {s['durationInFrames']}",
   368	            f"file: {json.dumps(s['file'])}",
   369	            f"text: {json.dumps(s['text'], ensure_ascii=False)}",
   370	        ]
   371	        if "sourceStartMs" in s:
   372	            parts.append(f"sourceStartMs: {s['sourceStartMs']}")
   373	        if "sourceEndMs" in s:
   374	            parts.append(f"sourceEndMs: {s['sourceEndMs']}")
   375	        ts_lines.append("  { " + ", ".join(parts) + " },")
   376	    ts_lines.append("];")
   377	    ts_lines.append("")
   378	    atomic_write_text(NARRATION_DATA_TS, "\n".join(ts_lines))
   379	
   380	    return segments, NARRATION_DATA_TS, CHUNK_META_JSON
   381	
   382	
   383	def _resolve_path(path_str: str) -> Path:
   384	    """非 absolute path は PROJ 相対に解決 (skill 実行時の cwd 揺れを吸収)."""
   385	    p = Path(path_str)
   386	    return p if p.is_absolute() else PROJ / p
   387	
   388	
   389	def collect_chunks(args, transcript: dict) -> list[dict]:
   390	    """各 chunk を {text, sourceStartMs, sourceEndMs} で返す.
   391	
   392	    Phase 3-I: transcript_fixed.json の segments[].start/end を保持。
   393	    Phase 3-J: validate_transcript_segment で start > end / 型不正を検出して
   394	    TranscriptSegmentError raise (Codex review P2 #3 反映、mlx-whisper の
   395	    稀なバグや手編集ミスによる壊れた transcript を早期検出)。
   396	    --script は 1 行 1 chunk で timing なし、--script-json は startMs/endMs
   397	    optional で受け付ける。
   398	    """
   399	    if args.script:
   400	        text = _resolve_path(args.script).read_text(encoding="utf-8")
   401	        return [
   402	            {"text": line.strip(), "sourceStartMs": None, "sourceEndMs": None}
   403	            for line in text.splitlines() if line.strip()
   404	        ]
   405	    if args.script_json:
   406	        plan = load_json(_resolve_path(args.script_json))
   407	        out: list[dict] = []
   408	        for i, s in enumerate(plan.get("segments", [])):
   409	            if not s.get("text", "").strip():
   410	                continue
   411	            # validate_transcript_segment は start/end key だけ見るので script-json
   412	            # の startMs/endMs を一旦同名 key にコピーして検証
   413	            validate_transcript_segment(
   414	                {"text": s.get("text"), "start": s.get("startMs"), "end": s.get("endMs")},
   415	                idx=i,
   416	            )
   417	            out.append(
   418	                {
   419	                    "text": s["text"].strip(),
   420	                    "sourceStartMs": s.get("startMs"),
   421	                    "sourceEndMs": s.get("endMs"),
   422	                }
   423	            )
   424	        return out
   425	    out_t: list[dict] = []
   426	    for i, s in enumerate(transcript.get("segments", [])):
   427	        if not s.get("text", "").strip():
   428	            continue
   429	        validate_transcript_segment(s, idx=i)
   430	        out_t.append(
   431	            {
   432	                "text": s["text"].strip(),
   433	                "sourceStartMs": s.get("start"),
   434	                "sourceEndMs": s.get("end"),
   435	            }
   436	        )
   437	    return out_t
   438	
   439	
   440	def main():
   441	    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
   442	    ap.add_argument("--speaker", type=int, default=DEFAULT_SPEAKER,
   443	                    help=f"VOICEVOX speaker id (default {DEFAULT_SPEAKER}=ずんだもんノーマル)")
   444	    ap.add_argument("--script", help="custom plain-text narration (1 line = 1 chunk)")
   445	    ap.add_argument("--script-json", help="custom JSON {segments:[{text}]} narration")
   446	    ap.add_argument("--list-speakers", action="store_true")
   447	    ap.add_argument("--require-engine", action="store_true",
   448	                    help="engine 不在で exit 4 (default は skip exit 0)")
   449	    ap.add_argument("--output", default=str(PROJ / "public" / "narration.wav"))
   450	    ap.add_argument(
   451	        "--fps",
   452	        type=int,
   453	        default=None,
   454	        help=f"narrationData.ts に書き込む frame 換算 fps "
   455	             f"(default: src/videoConfig.ts FPS、読めなければ {DEFAULT_FPS})",
   456	    )
   457	    ap.add_argument("--allow-partial", action="store_true",
   458	                    help="一部 chunk synthesis 失敗でも narration.wav を出力 + narrationData.ts 部分書き出し "
   459	                         "(default は全 chunk 成功必須)")
   460	    args = ap.parse_args()
   461	
   462	    ok, info = check_engine()
   463	    if not ok:
   464	        msg = f"VOICEVOX engine unavailable at {ENGINE_BASE}: {info}"
   465	        if args.require_engine:
   466	            print(f"ERROR: {msg}", file=sys.stderr)
   467	            return 4
   468	        print(f"INFO: {msg} -> narration generation skipped")
   469	        print(
   470	            "      Remotion 側の <NarrationAudio /> は public/narration.wav 不在 + "
   471	            "narrationData.ts 空を asset gate で検出し null を返すため render は失敗しない "
   472	            "(Phase 3-F asset gate + Phase 3-H per-segment Sequence)"
   473	        )
   474	        return 0
   475	    print(f"VOICEVOX engine OK (version: {info})")
   476	
   477	    if args.list_speakers:
   478	        speakers = list_speakers()
   479	        for s in speakers:
   480	            for style in s.get("styles", []):
   481	                print(f"  [{style.get('id'):3}] {s.get('name')} / {style.get('name')}")
   482	        return 0
   483	
   484	    transcript_path = PROJ / "transcript_fixed.json"
   485	    if not transcript_path.exists() and not (args.script or args.script_json):
   486	        print(f"ERROR: transcript_fixed.json missing under {PROJ}", file=sys.stderr)
   487	        return 3
   488	    transcript = load_json(transcript_path) if transcript_path.exists() else {}
   489	    try:
   490	        chunks = collect_chunks(args, transcript)
   491	    except TranscriptSegmentError as e:
   492	        # Codex Phase 3-I review P2 #3: 壊れた transcript で TTS を回さない
   493	        print(f"ERROR: transcript validation failed: {e}", file=sys.stderr)
   494	        return 3
   495	    if not chunks:
   496	        print("ERROR: no narration chunks", file=sys.stderr)
   497	        return 3
   498	
   499	    fps = args.fps if args.fps is not None else read_video_config_fps(PROJ)
   500	    if fps <= 0:
   501	        print(f"ERROR: invalid fps={fps} (--fps is positive integer required)", file=sys.stderr)
   502	        return 4
   503	    print(f"target fps: {fps}")
   504	
   505	    # Phase 3-H: stale narration を全 reset BEFORE synthesis
   506	    # (chunk wav / chunk_meta.json / narration.wav / narrationData.ts 全部、Codex P1 #2)
   507	    try:
   508	        cleanup_stale_all()
   509	    except StaleCleanupError as e:
   510	        print(f"ERROR: {e}", file=sys.stderr)
   511	        return 7
   512	    NARRATION_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   513	
   514	    chunk_paths: list[Path] = []
   515	    chunk_meta: list[tuple[str, int | None, int | None]] = []  # (text, sourceStartMs, sourceEndMs)
   516	    for i, ch in enumerate(chunks):
   517	        text = ch["text"]
   518	        try:
   519	            wav_bytes = synthesize(text, args.speaker)
   520	        except (urllib.error.HTTPError, urllib.error.URLError) as e:
   521	            print(f"WARN: synth failed for chunk {i}: {e}", file=sys.stderr)
   522	            continue
   523	        p = NARRATION_DIR / f"chunk_{i:03d}.wav"
   524	        atomic_write_bytes(p, wav_bytes)
   525	        chunk_paths.append(p)
   526	        chunk_meta.append((text, ch.get("sourceStartMs"), ch.get("sourceEndMs")))
   527	        print(f"  chunk[{i:3}] {len(wav_bytes)} bytes  text='{text[:30]}…'")
   528	
   529	    if not chunk_paths:
   530	        print("ERROR: no chunks succeeded", file=sys.stderr)
   531	        return 5
   532	    if not args.allow_partial and len(chunk_paths) < len(chunks):
   533	        print(
   534	            f"ERROR: only {len(chunk_paths)}/{len(chunks)} chunks succeeded "
   535	            f"(--allow-partial で部分成功でも narration.wav 出力可)",
   536	            file=sys.stderr,
   537	        )
   538	        # Phase 3-H all-or-nothing (Codex P1 #2): 部分 chunk + narrationData 全削除
   539	        # cleanup_stale_all() で narration.wav も含めて clean されているので追加削除のみ
   540	        for p in chunk_paths:
   541	            try:
   542	                p.unlink()
   543	            except OSError:
   544	                pass
   545	        return 6
   546	
   547	    out_path = _resolve_path(args.output)
   548	    try:
   549	        concat_wavs_atomic(chunk_paths, out_path)
   550	    except (wave.Error, EOFError) as e:
   551	        print(f"ERROR: WAV concat failed (wave.Error / EOFError): {e}", file=sys.stderr)
   552	        for p in chunk_paths:
   553	            try:
   554	                p.unlink()
   555	            except OSError:
   556	                pass
   557	        return 6
   558	    print(f"\nwrote: {out_path} ({out_path.stat().st_size} bytes)")
   559	    print(f"chunks succeeded: {len(chunk_paths)} / {len(chunks)} synthesized")
   560	
   561	    # Phase 3-H/I: chunk metadata + narrationData.ts (atomic、最後に書く)
   562	    # Codex Phase 3-I review P1 #2 反映: vad 部分破損は fail_fast で raise
   563	    # (legacy 経路で stale narration を出さないため)
   564	    try:
   565	        cut_segments = project_load_cut_segments(fps)
   566	    except (VadSchemaError, OSError, json.JSONDecodeError) as e:
   567	        print(
   568	            f"ERROR: vad_result.json schema invalid or unreadable: {e}",
   569	            file=sys.stderr,
   570	        )
   571	        # 全成果物を rollback (chunks + narration.wav)、narrationData は空のまま
   572	        for p in chunk_paths:
   573	            try:
   574	                p.unlink()
   575	            except OSError:
   576	                pass
   577	        if out_path.exists():
   578	            try:
   579	                out_path.unlink()
   580	            except OSError:
   581	                pass
   582	        return 8
   583	    if cut_segments:
   584	        print(f"cut-aware mapping: {len(cut_segments)} cut segments loaded from vad_result.json")
   585	
   586	    # Codex Phase 3-I review P3 #6 反映: chunk_paths と chunk_meta の長さ assert
   587	    assert len(chunk_paths) == len(chunk_meta), (
   588	        f"chunk_paths ({len(chunk_paths)}) と chunk_meta ({len(chunk_meta)}) の長さズレ"
   589	    )
   590	    pairs = [
   591	        (path, text, source_start, source_end)
   592	        for path, (text, source_start, source_end) in zip(chunk_paths, chunk_meta)
   593	    ]
   594	    try:
   595	        segments, ts_path, meta_path = write_narration_data(pairs, fps, cut_segments)
   596	    except (wave.Error, EOFError) as e:
   597	        print(f"ERROR: WAV duration probe failed (wave.Error / EOFError): {e}", file=sys.stderr)
   598	        # narrationData/meta は temp 書き出しなので残らない、chunks は残るが atomic 失敗
   599	        # so user は再実行 or --allow-partial で部分書き出し選択可
   600	        for p in chunk_paths:
   601	            try:
   602	                p.unlink()
   603	            except OSError:
   604	                pass
   605	        if out_path.exists():
   606	            try:
   607	                out_path.unlink()
   608	            except OSError:
   609	                pass
   610	        return 6
   611	    total_frames = max(
   612	        (s["startFrame"] + s["durationInFrames"] for s in segments), default=0
   613	    )
   614	    print(f"wrote: {ts_path} ({len(segments)} segments, total_frames={total_frames})")
   615	    print(f"wrote: {meta_path}")
   616	
   617	    summary = {
   618	        "speaker": args.speaker,
   619	        "fps": fps,
   620	        "chunks": len(chunk_paths),
   621	        "total_chunks": len(chunks),
   622	        "total_frames": total_frames,
   623	        "cut_aware": bool(cut_segments),
   624	        "transcript_aligned_count": sum(
   625	            1 for s in segments if s.get("timing_source") == "transcript_aligned"
   626	        ),
   627	        "narration_wav": str(out_path),
   628	        "narration_data_ts": str(ts_path),
   629	        "chunk_meta_json": str(meta_path),
   630	        "engine_version": info,
   631	    }
   632	    print(f"\nsummary: {json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=False)}")
   633	    return 0
   634	
   635	
   636	if __name__ == "__main__":
   637	    sys.exit(main())

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	"""SuperMovie Phase 3-B: transcript_fixed.json + project-config.json → src/Slides/slideData.ts.
     3	
     4	Codex Phase 3B design (2026-05-04, CODEX_PHASE3B_NEXT) 推奨: A 一択 + deterministic first.
     5	
     6	入力:
     7	    <PROJECT>/transcript_fixed.json  - segments[] / words[]
     8	    <PROJECT>/project-config.json    - format / tone
     9	    (任意) <PROJECT>/vad_result.json - cut segments の元データ (cut 後 frame 変換用)
    10	
    11	出力:
    12	    <PROJECT>/src/Slides/slideData.ts - SlideSegment[]
    13	
    14	Usage:
    15	    python3 scripts/build_slide_data.py [--mode topic|segment]
    16	
    17	  --mode topic    (default): 連続 segments をグループ化して 1 slide に
    18	  --mode segment           : 1 transcript segment = 1 slide (シンプル)
    19	"""
    20	from __future__ import annotations
    21	
    22	import argparse
    23	import json
    24	import sys
    25	from pathlib import Path
    26	
    27	PROJ = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent
    28	sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).resolve().parent))
    29	from timeline import (  # noqa: E402
    30	    build_cut_segments_from_vad as _bcs_raw,
    31	    ms_to_playback_frame as _msf_raw,
    32	    read_video_config_fps,
    33	    validate_vad_schema,
    34	)
    35	
    36	FPS = read_video_config_fps(PROJ)  # Phase 3-J: timeline 共通化、videoConfig.FPS と同期
    37	SILENCE_THRESHOLD_MS = 1500  # 1.5 秒以上の無音で話題区切り
    38	TITLE_MAX_CHARS = {"youtube": 18, "short": 14, "square": 16}
    39	BULLET_MAX_CHARS = {"youtube": 24, "short": 18, "square": 20}
    40	MAX_BULLETS_PER_SLIDE = 5
    41	MAX_SEGMENTS_PER_SLIDE = 5  # silence 検出失敗時の機械 fallback
    42	
    43	
    44	def load_json(p: Path):
    45	    return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    46	
    47	
    48	def build_cut_segments_from_vad(vad: dict | None) -> list[dict]:
    49	    """Phase 3-J: timeline.build_cut_segments_from_vad を FPS 注入 wrapper.
    50	
    51	    旧 inline 実装は timeline.py に集約した。validate を経由して schema 破損は
    52	    raise (build_slide_data は cut が壊れていれば slide も壊れるため fail-fast)。
    53	    """
    54	    if not vad:
    55	        return []
    56	    return _bcs_raw(validate_vad_schema(vad), FPS)
    57	
    58	
    59	def ms_to_playback_frame(ms: int, cut_segments: list[dict]) -> int | None:
    60	    """Phase 3-J: timeline.ms_to_playback_frame を FPS 注入 wrapper."""
    61	    return _msf_raw(ms, FPS, cut_segments)
    62	
    63	
    64	def truncate(text: str, max_chars: int) -> str:
    65	    text = text.strip()
    66	    if len(text) <= max_chars:
    67	        return text
    68	    return text[:max_chars - 1] + "…"
    69	
    70	
    71	def group_topics(segments: list[dict], threshold_ms: int = SILENCE_THRESHOLD_MS) -> list[list[dict]]:
    72	    """隣接 segments の間隔 >= threshold_ms で話題区切り."""
    73	    if not segments:
    74	        return []
    75	    groups: list[list[dict]] = [[segments[0]]]
    76	    for prev, cur in zip(segments, segments[1:]):
    77	        gap_ms = cur["start"] - prev["end"]
    78	        if gap_ms >= threshold_ms or len(groups[-1]) >= MAX_SEGMENTS_PER_SLIDE:
    79	            groups.append([cur])
    80	        else:
    81	            groups[-1].append(cur)
    82	    return groups
    83	
    84	
    85	def style_for_tone(tone: str) -> dict:
    86	    table = {
    87	        "プロフェッショナル": {"align": "center", "bg": "rgba(20, 26, 44, 0.92)", "emphasis_ratio": 0.2},
    88	        "エンタメ": {"align": "left", "bg": "#101a2c", "emphasis_ratio": 0.4},
    89	        "カジュアル": {"align": "left", "bg": "rgba(40, 30, 60, 0.9)", "emphasis_ratio": 0.3},
    90	        "教育的": {"align": "left", "bg": "#0f2540", "emphasis_ratio": 0.4},
    91	    }
    92	    return table.get(tone, table["プロフェッショナル"])
    93	
    94	
    95	def build_slides_topic_mode(segments: list[dict], cut_segments: list[dict],
    96	                            fmt: str, tone: str) -> list[dict]:
    97	    title_max = TITLE_MAX_CHARS.get(fmt, TITLE_MAX_CHARS["short"])
    98	    bullet_max = BULLET_MAX_CHARS.get(fmt, BULLET_MAX_CHARS["short"])
    99	    style = style_for_tone(tone)
   100	    cut_total = cut_segments[-1]["playbackEnd"] if cut_segments else None
   101	
   102	    slides: list[dict] = []
   103	    groups = group_topics(segments)
   104	    for group_idx, group in enumerate(groups):
   105	        first = group[0]
   106	        last = group[-1]
   107	
   108	        pb_start = ms_to_playback_frame(first["start"], cut_segments)
   109	        pb_end = ms_to_playback_frame(last["end"], cut_segments)
   110	        if pb_start is None or pb_end is None:
   111	            continue
   112	        if cut_total is not None:
   113	            pb_end = min(pb_end, cut_total)
   114	        if pb_end <= pb_start:
   115	            continue
   116	
   117	        title = truncate(first["text"], title_max)
   118	        subtitle = truncate(last["text"], title_max + 6) if len(group) > 1 and last is not first else None
   119	        if subtitle == title:
   120	            subtitle = None
   121	
   122	        bullets: list[dict] = []
   123	        bullets_source = group[1:-1] if len(group) >= 3 else group
   124	        for i, seg in enumerate(bullets_source[:MAX_BULLETS_PER_SLIDE]):
   125	            text = truncate(seg["text"], bullet_max)
   126	            emphasis = (i == 0 and style["emphasis_ratio"] >= 0.4) or (
   127	                style["emphasis_ratio"] >= 0.3 and i == len(bullets_source) // 2
   128	            )
   129	            bullets.append({"text": text, "emphasis": emphasis})
   130	
   131	        slides.append({
   132	            "id": group_idx + 1,
   133	            "startFrame": pb_start,
   134	            "endFrame": pb_end,
   135	            "title": title,
   136	            "subtitle": subtitle,
   137	            "bullets": bullets if bullets else None,
   138	            "align": style["align"],
   139	            "backgroundColor": style["bg"],
   140	            "videoLayer": "visible",
   141	        })
   142	    return slides
   143	
   144	
   145	def build_slides_segment_mode(segments: list[dict], cut_segments: list[dict],
   146	                              fmt: str, tone: str) -> list[dict]:
   147	    title_max = TITLE_MAX_CHARS.get(fmt, TITLE_MAX_CHARS["short"])
   148	    style = style_for_tone(tone)
   149	    cut_total = cut_segments[-1]["playbackEnd"] if cut_segments else None
   150	
   151	    slides: list[dict] = []
   152	    for i, seg in enumerate(segments):
   153	        pb_start = ms_to_playback_frame(seg["start"], cut_segments)
   154	        pb_end = ms_to_playback_frame(seg["end"], cut_segments)
   155	        if pb_start is None or pb_end is None:
   156	            continue
   157	        if cut_total is not None:
   158	            pb_end = min(pb_end, cut_total)
   159	        if pb_end <= pb_start:
   160	            continue
   161	        slides.append({
   162	            "id": i + 1,
   163	            "startFrame": pb_start,
   164	            "endFrame": pb_end,
   165	            "title": truncate(seg["text"], title_max),
   166	            "align": style["align"],
   167	            "backgroundColor": style["bg"],
   168	            "videoLayer": "visible",
   169	        })
   170	    return slides
   171	
   172	
   173	def render_slide_data_ts(slides: list[dict]) -> str:
   174	    lines = [
   175	        "import type { SlideSegment } from './types';",
   176	        "",
   177	        "// 自動生成: scripts/build_slide_data.py",
   178	        f"// {len(slides)} slides を transcript_fixed.json から生成",
   179	        "",
   180	        "export const slideData: SlideSegment[] = [",
   181	    ]
   182	    for s in slides:
   183	        parts = [
   184	            f"id: {s['id']}",
   185	            f"startFrame: {s['startFrame']}",
   186	            f"endFrame: {s['endFrame']}",
   187	            f"title: {json.dumps(s['title'], ensure_ascii=False)}",
   188	        ]
   189	        if s.get("subtitle"):
   190	            parts.append(f"subtitle: {json.dumps(s['subtitle'], ensure_ascii=False)}")
   191	        if s.get("bullets"):
   192	            bullets_ts = ", ".join(
   193	                "{ text: " + json.dumps(b["text"], ensure_ascii=False)
   194	                + (", emphasis: true" if b.get("emphasis") else "")
   195	                + " }"
   196	                for b in s["bullets"]
   197	            )
   198	            parts.append(f"bullets: [{bullets_ts}]")
   199	        if s.get("align"):
   200	            parts.append(f"align: '{s['align']}'")
   201	        if s.get("backgroundColor"):
   202	            parts.append(f"backgroundColor: {json.dumps(s['backgroundColor'], ensure_ascii=False)}")
   203	        if s.get("videoLayer"):
   204	            parts.append(f"videoLayer: '{s['videoLayer']}'")
   205	        lines.append("  { " + ", ".join(parts) + " },")
   206	    lines.append("];")
   207	    lines.append("")
   208	    return "\n".join(lines)
   209	
   210	
   211	PLAN_VERSION = "supermovie.slide_plan.v1"
   212	ALLOWED_ALIGN = ("center", "left")
   213	ALLOWED_VIDEO_LAYER = ("visible", "dimmed", "hidden")
   214	
   215	
   216	def validate_slide_plan(plan: dict, words: list[dict], cut_total_frames: int | None,
   217	                        fmt: str) -> list[str]:
   218	    """Codex Phase 3-C validate (Q4) を実装。invalid なら理由を返す (空 list = OK)."""
   219	    title_max = TITLE_MAX_CHARS.get(fmt, TITLE_MAX_CHARS["short"])
   220	    bullet_max = BULLET_MAX_CHARS.get(fmt, BULLET_MAX_CHARS["short"])
   221	    errors: list[str] = []
   222	    if not isinstance(plan, dict):
   223	        return ["plan is not a dict"]
   224	    if plan.get("version") != PLAN_VERSION:
   225	        errors.append(f"version mismatch (expect {PLAN_VERSION})")
   226	    slides = plan.get("slides")
   227	    if not isinstance(slides, list):
   228	        errors.append("slides is not a list")
   229	        return errors
   230	    n_words = len(words)
   231	    last_end_idx = -1
   232	    last_id = 0
   233	    for i, s in enumerate(slides):
   234	        if not isinstance(s, dict):
   235	            errors.append(f"slides[{i}] not a dict")
   236	            continue
   237	        sid = s.get("id")
   238	        if not isinstance(sid, int) or sid <= last_id:
   239	            errors.append(f"slides[{i}].id must be ascending int (got {sid})")
   240	        else:
   241	            last_id = sid
   242	        sw = s.get("startWordIndex")
   243	        ew = s.get("endWordIndex")
   244	        if not (isinstance(sw, int) and isinstance(ew, int)
   245	                and 0 <= sw <= ew < n_words):
   246	            errors.append(f"slides[{i}] startWordIndex/endWordIndex out of range (got {sw}/{ew}, words={n_words})")
   247	            continue
   248	        if sw <= last_end_idx:
   249	            errors.append(f"slides[{i}] word range overlaps previous (sw={sw} <= prev end {last_end_idx})")
   250	        last_end_idx = ew
   251	        title = s.get("title")
   252	        if not isinstance(title, str) or not title.strip():
   253	            errors.append(f"slides[{i}].title empty")
   254	        elif len(title) > title_max:
   255	            errors.append(f"slides[{i}].title too long ({len(title)} > {title_max})")
   256	        bullets = s.get("bullets") or []
   257	        if not isinstance(bullets, list) or len(bullets) > MAX_BULLETS_PER_SLIDE:
   258	            errors.append(f"slides[{i}].bullets exceeds {MAX_BULLETS_PER_SLIDE}")
   259	        else:
   260	            for j, b in enumerate(bullets):
   261	                bt = b.get("text") if isinstance(b, dict) else None
   262	                if not isinstance(bt, str) or not bt.strip():
   263	                    errors.append(f"slides[{i}].bullets[{j}] empty text")
   264	                elif len(bt) > bullet_max:
   265	                    errors.append(f"slides[{i}].bullets[{j}] too long ({len(bt)} > {bullet_max})")
   266	        align = s.get("align")
   267	        if align is not None and align not in ALLOWED_ALIGN:
   268	            errors.append(f"slides[{i}].align invalid ({align})")
   269	        video_layer = s.get("videoLayer")
   270	        if video_layer is not None and video_layer not in ALLOWED_VIDEO_LAYER:
   271	            errors.append(f"slides[{i}].videoLayer invalid ({video_layer})")
   272	    return errors
   273	
   274	
   275	def build_slides_from_plan(plan: dict, words: list[dict], cut_segments: list[dict],
   276	                           fmt: str, tone: str) -> list[dict]:
   277	    """validated plan を SlideSegment dict 列に変換 (frame は script 側で計算)."""
   278	    style = style_for_tone(tone)
   279	    cut_total = cut_segments[-1]["playbackEnd"] if cut_segments else None
   280	    slides: list[dict] = []
   281	    for s in plan["slides"]:
   282	        sw = s["startWordIndex"]
   283	        ew = s["endWordIndex"]
   284	        ms_start = words[sw].get("start", 0)
   285	        ms_end = words[ew].get("end", 0)
   286	        pb_start = ms_to_playback_frame(ms_start, cut_segments)
   287	        pb_end = ms_to_playback_frame(ms_end, cut_segments)
   288	        if pb_start is None or pb_end is None or pb_end <= pb_start:
   289	            continue
   290	        if cut_total is not None:
   291	            pb_end = min(pb_end, cut_total)
   292	        slides.append({
   293	            "id": s["id"],
   294	            "startFrame": pb_start,
   295	            "endFrame": pb_end,
   296	            "title": s["title"],
   297	            "subtitle": s.get("subtitle"),
   298	            "bullets": s.get("bullets") or None,
   299	            "align": s.get("align") or style["align"],
   300	            "backgroundColor": s.get("backgroundColor") or style["bg"],
   301	            "videoLayer": s.get("videoLayer") or "visible",
   302	        })
   303	    return slides
   304	
   305	
   306	def main():
   307	    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
   308	    ap.add_argument("--mode", choices=["topic", "segment"], default="topic")
   309	    ap.add_argument("--plan", help="optional slide_plan.json (LLM 生成)")
   310	    ap.add_argument("--strict-plan", action="store_true",
   311	                    help="--plan の validate 失敗時に exit 2 (default は warning + deterministic fallback)")
   312	    args = ap.parse_args()
   313	
   314	    transcript_path = PROJ / "transcript_fixed.json"
   315	    config_path = PROJ / "project-config.json"
   316	    if not transcript_path.exists() or not config_path.exists():
   317	        raise SystemExit(f"missing input: transcript_fixed.json or project-config.json under {PROJ}")
   318	
   319	    transcript = load_json(transcript_path)
   320	    config = load_json(config_path)
   321	    fmt = config.get("format", "short")
   322	    tone = config.get("tone", "プロフェッショナル")
   323	    segments = transcript.get("segments", [])
   324	    words = transcript.get("words", [])
   325	
   326	    vad_path = PROJ / "vad_result.json"
   327	    vad = load_json(vad_path) if vad_path.exists() else None
   328	    cut_segments = build_cut_segments_from_vad(vad)
   329	    cut_total_frames = cut_segments[-1]["playbackEnd"] if cut_segments else None
   330	
   331	    used_plan = False
   332	    if args.plan:
   333	        plan_path = Path(args.plan)
   334	        if not plan_path.exists():
   335	            msg = f"--plan path not found: {plan_path}"
   336	            if args.strict_plan:
   337	                raise SystemExit(msg)
   338	            print(f"WARN: {msg} → deterministic fallback")
   339	        else:
   340	            plan = load_json(plan_path)
   341	            errors = validate_slide_plan(plan, words, cut_total_frames, fmt)
   342	            if errors:
   343	                if args.strict_plan:
   344	                    print("ERROR: plan validation failed:")
   345	                    for e in errors:
   346	                        print(f"  - {e}")
   347	                    raise SystemExit(2)
   348	                print("WARN: plan validation failed, deterministic fallback:")
   349	                for e in errors:
   350	                    print(f"  - {e}")
   351	            else:
   352	                slides = build_slides_from_plan(plan, words, cut_segments, fmt, tone)
   353	                used_plan = True
   354	                print(f"=== plan accepted ({len(plan.get('slides', []))} slides) ===")
   355	
   356	    if not used_plan:
   357	        if args.mode == "topic":
   358	            slides = build_slides_topic_mode(segments, cut_segments, fmt, tone)
   359	        else:
   360	            slides = build_slides_segment_mode(segments, cut_segments, fmt, tone)
   361	
   362	    out_path = PROJ / "src" / "Slides" / "slideData.ts"
   363	    backup = PROJ / "src" / "Slides" / "slideData.backup.ts"
   364	    if out_path.exists() and not backup.exists():
   365	        backup.write_text(out_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"), encoding="utf-8")
   366	    ts = render_slide_data_ts(slides)
   367	    out_path.write_text(ts, encoding="utf-8")
   368	
   369	    mode_label = "plan" if used_plan else f"deterministic-{args.mode}"
   370	    print(f"=== slideData.ts 生成 (mode={mode_label}) ===")
   371	    print(f"path: {out_path}")
   372	    print(f"input segments: {len(segments)}")
   373	    print(f"output slides: {len(slides)}")
   374	    for s in slides:
   375	        bullets_count = len(s.get("bullets") or [])
   376	        print(f"  [{s['id']:2}] f{s['startFrame']:5}-{s['endFrame']:5} '{s['title']}' (bullets={bullets_count})")
   377	
   378	
   379	if __name__ == "__main__":
   380	    main()
